TECHMART ELECTRONICS - SHIPPING POLICY

DOMESTIC SHIPPING (USA)
- Standard Shipping: 5-7 business days - FREE on orders over $50
- Express Shipping: 2-3 business days - $9.99
- Overnight Shipping: Next business day - $24.99
- Same Day Delivery: Available in select cities - $14.99

ORDER PROCESSING
- Orders placed before 2PM EST ship same day (business days)
- Orders placed after 2PM EST ship next business day
- Orders are not processed on weekends or federal holidays

INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING
- Ca

s are not processed on weekends or federal holidays

INTERNATIONAL SHIPPING
- Canada: 5-10 business days - $15.99
- Europe: 7-14 business days - $24.99
- Asia Pacific: 10-21 business days - $29.99
- All other countries: 14-21 business days - $34.99

TRACKING
- Tracking number provided via email within 24 hours of shipment
- Track at techmart.com/track or via the carrier's website
- SMS tracking alerts available when you add your phone number

DELIVERY ISSUES
- Missing package: Report within 7 da

you add your phone number

DELIVERY ISSUES
- Missing package: Report within 7 days of expected delivery
- Wrong item received: Contact support within 48 hours
- Damaged in transit: Report within 48 hours with photos

FREE SHIPPING THRESHOLDS
- Standard: Free on orders $50+
- TechMart Premium Members: Always free standard shipping

TECHMART ELECTRONICS - USER MANUAL

ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT

Creating an Account:
1. Visit techmart.com and click "Sign Up"
2. Enter your email address and create a strong password
3. Verify your email address via the confirmation link
4. Complete your profile with name and phone number
5. Enable two-factor authentication for security

Resetting Password:
1. Click "Forgot Password" on the login page
2. Enter your registered email address
3. Check your email for the reset link (valid for 1 hour)
4. Cr

ed email address
3. Check your email for the reset link (valid for 1 hour)
4. Create a new password (minimum 8 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 number)
5. Log in with your new password

Account Locked:
- Accounts are locked after 5 failed login attempts
- Wait 30 minutes for automatic unlock
- Or contact support@techmart.com for immediate unlock

SUBSCRIPTION MANAGEMENT

Upgrading Your Plan:
1. Log in to your account
2. Go to Settings > Subscription
3. Select your desired plan
4. Enter payment informa

to Settings > Subscription
3. Select your desired plan
4. Enter payment information
5. Confirm upgrade - takes effect immediately

Cancelling Subscription:
1. Go to Settings > Subscription > Cancel Plan
2. Confirm cancellation
3. Access continues until end of billing period
4. Data retained for 30 days after cancellation

CLOUD STORAGE

Accessing Cloud Storage:
- Visit cloud.techmart.com or use the TechMart app
- Upload files by dragging and dropping
- Share files by right-clicking and selectin

load files by dragging and dropping
- Share files by right-clicking and selecting "Share"
- Storage resets monthly for Basic plan

SUPPORT AND FEEDBACK

Submitting a Support Ticket:
1. Log in to your account
2. Go to Help > Submit Ticket
3. Describe your issue in detail
4. Attach screenshots if relevant
5. Expect response within 24 hours (4 hours for Premium)

Providing Feedback:
- Rate your support experience after each interaction
- Submit product feedback at feedback.techmart.com
- Join our b

each interaction
- Submit product feedback at feedback.techmart.com
- Join our beta program at beta.techmart.com

TECHMART ELECTRONICS - INSTALLATION AND SETUP GUIDE

LAPTOP INITIAL SETUP
1. Charge your laptop to 100% before first use
2. Press the power button to turn on
3. Select your language and region
4. Connect to your WiFi network
5. Sign in with your Microsoft account or create one
6. Complete Windows 11 setup wizard
7. Run Windows Update (Settings > Update & Security > Windows Update)
8. Install TechMart Driver Pack from support.techmart.com/drivers
9. Register your product at warranty.techmart.com

support.techmart.com/drivers
9. Register your product at warranty.techmart.com

SMARTPHONE INITIAL SETUP
1. Insert SIM card using the provided tool
2. Power on by holding the side button
3. Select language and connect to WiFi
4. Sign in with Google account or Apple ID
5. Restore from backup or set up as new device
6. Enable biometric authentication (fingerprint/face)
7. Download TechMart app from App Store or Google Play

COMMON INSTALLATION ISSUES

Cannot connect to WiFi:
1. Forget the network

Play

COMMON INSTALLATION ISSUES

Cannot connect to WiFi:
1. Forget the network and reconnect
2. Restart your router
3. Check if WiFi is enabled in settings
4. Update network adapter drivers

Bluetooth not working:
1. Turn Bluetooth off and on again
2. Remove device from paired list and re-pair
3. Ensure devices are within 10 meters
4. Restart both devices

Laptop won't turn on:
1. Ensure charger is properly connected
2. Hold power button for 10 seconds (force restart)
3. Remove battery (if rem

ed
2. Hold power button for 10 seconds (force restart)
3. Remove battery (if removable), wait 30 seconds, reinsert
4. Contact support if issue persists

Slow performance:
1. Check available storage (minimum 10% free space required)
2. Close unnecessary background apps
3. Run disk cleanup (Windows: search "Disk Cleanup")
4. Check for malware with Windows Defender
5. Perform factory reset if issue persists (backup data first)

DRIVER UPDATES
- Visit support.techmart.com/drivers
- Enter your model

first)

DRIVER UPDATES
- Visit support.techmart.com/drivers
- Enter your model number
- Download and install recommended drivers
- Restart after installation

TECHMART ELECTRONICS - FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: What are your customer support hours?
A: Our customer support is available Monday to Friday, 9AM to 6PM EST. Emergency technical support is available 24/7 via email at support@techmart.com.

Q: How do I track my order?
A: Log into your TechMart account, go to "My Orders" and click on your order number. You will receive tracking updates via email automatically.

Q: Do you offer international shipping?
A: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. Inte

Do you offer international shipping?
A: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. International shipping takes 7-14 business days. Additional customs fees may apply depending on your country.

Q: How do I contact TechMart Electronics?
A: Email: support@techmart.com | Phone: 1-800-TECHMART | Live Chat: Available on our website during business hours.

Q: Do you have a physical store?
A: Yes, we have stores in New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, and Houston. Visit our website for addresses and hours.

Q: Wha

ngeles, Chicago, and Houston. Visit our website for addresses and hours.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

Q: Is my payment information secure?
A: Yes, all transactions are encrypted with 256-bit SSL. We never store full credit card numbers.

Q: How do I create a TechMart account?
A: Click "Sign Up" on our website, enter your email and create a password. You'll receive a verification email to activate your
mail and create a password. You'll receive a verification email to activate your account.

TECHMART ELECTRONICS - WARRANTY POLICY

STANDARD WARRANTY COVERAGE
- Laptops and Computers: 1 year parts and labor
- Smartphones and Tablets: 1 year parts and labor
- Accessories (cables, chargers): 6 months
- Smart Home Devices: 2 years
- Monitors and Displays: 3 years

WHAT IS COVERED
- Manufacturing defects
- Hardware failures under normal use
- Battery defects (capacity below 80% within warranty period)
- Screen defects (dead pixels exceeding 5 pixels)

WHAT IS NOT COVERED
- Physical damage

defects (dead pixels exceeding 5 pixels)

WHAT IS NOT COVERED
- Physical damage (drops, spills, cracks)
- Damage from unauthorized repairs
- Cosmetic damage (scratches, dents)
- Damage from power surges (use a surge protector)
- Water damage unless device is rated waterproof

TECHMART PREMIUM WARRANTY (OPTIONAL)
- Extends coverage to 3 years on all products
- Covers accidental damage (1 claim per year)
- Priority support with 4-hour response time
- Price: $49.99/year for devices under $500, $99.

port with 4-hour response time
- Price: $49.99/year for devices under $500, $99.99/year for devices $500+

HOW TO CLAIM WARRANTY
1. Contact support@techmart.com with your order number and issue description
2. Our team will diagnose the issue within 24 hours
3. Ship device to our repair center (free prepaid label provided)
4. Repair or replacement completed within 7-10 business days

WARRANTY REGISTRATION
Register your product at warranty.techmart.com within 30 days of purchase for extended benef
r product at warranty.techmart.com within 30 days of purchase for extended benefits.

TECHMART ELECTRONICS - REFUND AND RETURN POLICY

RETURN WINDOW
- Standard products: 30 days from date of purchase
- Electronics and accessories: 15 days from date of purchase
- Software and digital products: Non-refundable once downloaded

ELIGIBILITY
- Item must be in original condition with all accessories and packaging
- Proof of purchase required (order number or receipt)
- Items damaged by misuse are not eligible for refund

REFUND PROCESS
1. Submit a return request at returns.techmart.com

e for refund

REFUND PROCESS
1. Submit a return request at returns.techmart.com or call 1-800-TECHMART
2. Receive a Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number within 24 hours
3. Ship the item back using the prepaid label provided
4. Refund processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item

REFUND METHODS
- Original payment method: 5-7 business days
- Store credit: Immediate upon return approval
- Exchange: Processed within 3-5 business days

EXCEPTIONS
- Opened software cannot be r

ge: Processed within 3-5 business days

EXCEPTIONS
- Opened software cannot be returned
- Items marked "Final Sale" are non-returnable
- International orders: Customer responsible for return shipping costs

DAMAGED OR DEFECTIVE ITEMS
- Report within 48 hours of delivery
- We will provide free return shipping and full refund or replacement
- Email photos of damage to returns@techmart.com
